slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 7 - Karolo ya Senior
slides.title: Tshebedisano le Kgohlano Moeling wa Kapa
slides.lead: Kamoo dichaba tsa Maxhosa, batrekboer, Manyesemane le baromuwa ba ileng ba kopana, ba hwebelana mme ba loana ka teng moeling wa Kapa Botjhabela mathwasong a bo-1800.

media.alt: Noka e tala e kgetha pakeng tsa mabaka a mabedi, le leng le nang le dikgomo mme le leng le nang le koloi, di kopanang moeling.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L120 112 L180 90 L250 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 40 q10 40 -6 70 q-14 26 4 70' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='250' cy='44' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='138' rx='12' ry='7' fill='#5c3a22'/><rect x='214' y='128' width='34' height='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='220' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='242' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beha maemo: 'moedi' (frontier) ha se mola feela mmapeng empa ke sebaka se sephara moo dichaba tse fapaneng di phelang haufi le tse ding, ka nako tse ding di thusana mme ka tse ding di loana. Hlalosa hore karolo ena e sheba moedi wa Kapa Botjhabela mathwasong a bo-1800, hoo e ka bang haufi le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish (Great Fish River). Botsa baithuti hore ba nahana ho etsahalang ha dihlopha tse pedi ka bobedi di batla naha le metsi a le mang.

slides.title: Moedi wa Kapa Botjhabela
slides.lead: Ka 1800 Kolone ya Kapa e ne e atolohile ho ya botjhabela ho fihlela balemi ba Madache ba kopana le dichaba tsa Maxhosa haufi le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish.

blocks.text: **Kolone ya Kapa** e qadile e le sebaka sa bodulo sa Madache Table Bay ka 1652. Ho theosa le dilemo tse 150, balemi ba dikgomo ba bitswang **batrekboer** ba ile ba tswela pele ho ya botjhabela ba batla naha ya phulo. Ka 1795, hape ka 1806, **Borithane** bo ile ba nka taolo ya Kapa.

items: Sebaka sa moedi se ne se le sebakeng seo kajeno se bitswang Kapa Botjhabela, haufi le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish.
E ne e se moedi o tsitsitseng - o ne o fetoha ha batho ba tsamaya mme dintwa di loanwa.
Dihlopha tse fapaneng di ne di arolelana, di qothisana lehlokwa mme di loanela naha le metsi a le mang.

media.alt: Mmapa o bonolo o bontshang Kolone ya Kapa ka bophirimela le naha ya Maxhosa ka botjhabela, e arotswe ke Noka e Kgolo ya Fish.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='126' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 18 q-8 40 4 62 q10 22 -4 62' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='6'/><text x='30' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Cape</text><text x='24' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Colony</text><text x='150' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>Xhosa</text><text x='152' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Fumanela baithuti moedi sebakeng le nakong. Supa mmapeng Kapa Botjhabela le Noka e Kgolo ya Fish. Hatisa hore moedi o ne o tswela pele ho ya botjhabela ha kolone e ntse e hola. Hlokomela phetoho ho tloha taolong ya Madache ho ya taolong ya Borithane, e ileng ya ba bohlokwa hobane Borithane bo ile ba tlisa bajaki ba batjha le maano a matjha moeling.

slides.title: Ke bomang ba neng ba dula moeling?
slides.lead: Dihlopha tse ngata di ne di arolelana sebaka sa moedi, e mong le e mong a e-na le mokgwa wa hae wa bophelo.

blocks.heading: Dichaba tsa Maxhosa
blocks.text: Balemi ba rutang dikgomo ba neng ba dula meritong ya marena ka botjhabela ba Noka ya Fish, ba etellwa pele ke marena a kang Ngqika le Ndlambe.

blocks.heading: Batrekboer
blocks.text: Balemi ba dikgomo ba buang Sedache ba tswang Kapa ba ileng ba tsamaela botjhabela ba batla naha e ntjha ya phulo.

blocks.heading: Makhoikhoi le Masan
blocks.text: Barui le baithwadi ba pele ba sebaka sena, ba bangata ba neng ba se ba sebetsa mapolasing a kolone kapa ba dula har'a Maxhosa.

blocks.heading: Manyesemane le baromuwa
blocks.text: Bahlanka ba Borithane, masole le Bajaki ba 1820, hammoho le baromuwa ba tlileng ho ruta le ho sokolla batho.

slides.notes: Fa baithuti lenane la baphetohi pele pale e phetha. Hatisa hore Maxhosa e ne e le balemi ba nang le tsamaiso e matla ya setjhaba le ya sepolotiki, e seng feela ba neng ba 'thibela' bajaki. Hlokomela hore batho ba Makhoikhoi le Masan ba ne ba se ba le teng nako e telele pele ho dihlopha tsena ka bobedi. Qoba ho bontsha sehlopha se seng se le setle ka ho phethahala kapa se sebe ka ho phethahala.

slides.title: Ho hwebelana le ho phela hammoho
slides.lead: Boholo ba nako, batho ba moedi ba ne ba sebedisana hobane ba ne ba hlokana.

blocks.text: Bophelo moeling e ne e se feela ka ntwa. Dichaba tsa Maxhosa le makolone ba ne ba **hwebelana**, ba fapanyetsana dikgomo, mahlaka a tlou (ivory), dikgeka, koporo, lesela le disebediswa tsa tshepe. Batho ba bang ba ne ba ithuta dipuo tsa ba bang, ba sebetsa hammoho mme ba bile ba nyalana pakeng tsa dihlopha.

items: Dikgomo e ne e le leruo bakeng sa balemi ba Maxhosa le batrekboer ka bobedi, kahoo ba ne ba hwebelana mme ba lisa mmoho.
Basebetsi, baithwadi le bahwebi ba Makhoikhoi hangata ba ne ba tsamaya pakeng tsa mekgatlo ena e mmedi.
Baromuwa, marena le bahlanka ka nako tse ding ba ne ba etsa ditumellano ho boloka khotso.

media.alt: Matsoho a mabedi a fapanyetsanang thepa ka holimo ho dikgomo tse pedi, a bontshang kgwebo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M120 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#8a6a44'/><path d='M52 108 q-6 -10 4 -12 M88 108 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Slaete ena e leka-lekanya pale hore baithuti ba se ke ba nahana hore moedi e ne e le sebaka sa dikgohlano feela. Dikamano tsa sebele - kgwebo, mosebetsi, lenyalo, ho ithuta dipuo - di ne di tshela moedi. Tshebedisano ena ke halofo ya sehlooho sa CAPS mme e bonolo ho e lebala. Botsa baithuti mehlala ya sejwalejwale ya dihlopha tse qothisanang lehlokwa hape di sebedisanang.

slides.title: Hobaneng kgohlano e ile ya hola?
slides.lead: Dintho tseo batho ba neng ba di arolelana - naha, metsi le dikgomo - le tsona di ne di baka dikgang.

blocks.text: Ha batrekboer ba bangata le hamorao bajaki ba Borithane ba fihla, ba ne ba batla **naha** le **phulo** e eketsehileng. Sena se ile sa hatella dichaba tsa Maxhosa tse neng di se di sebedisa naha eo. Ha dikgomo di nyamela, lehlakore le leng le le leng le ne le beha molato ho le leng, mme ditlhaselo tse nyenyane di ne di ka fetoha ntwa.

items: Dihlopha ka bobedi di ne di rua dikgomo, kahoo tlholisano ya naha ya phulo e ne e le teng ka mehla.
Ho utswa dikgomo ke mahlakore ka bobedi ho ile ha baka bohale le ho se tshepane.
Mmuso wa kolone o ne o ntse o leka ho beha moedi o tiileng le ho tlosa Maxhosa naheng e ka bophirimela ho oona.

media.alt: Kgomo bohareng le metsu e mmedi e hulang ka mahlakore a fapaneng, e bontshang tlholisano.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='84' rx='30' ry='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 70 q-6 -10 4 -12 M128 70 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M64 84 L20 84 M28 76 L20 84 L28 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M156 84 L200 84 M192 76 L200 84 L192 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlakisa sesosa le phello ka ho hlaka: palo e eketsehang ya bajaki hammoho le moruo o arolelanwang wa dikgomo hammoho le moedi o fetohang ho ile ha lebisa kgohlanong. Bontsha hore ho utswa dikgomo ho ne ho etsahala mahlakoreng ka bobedi - sena se bohlokwa bakeng sa toka. Hlalosa hore diteko tsa mmuso tsa ho hula mola o tiileng, le ho boloka Maxhosa lehlakoreng le le leng la oona, di ile tsa etsa hore khotso e be thata.

slides.title: Dintwa tsa Moedi
slides.lead: Pakeng tsa 1779 le 1879 ho bile le letoto la dintwa pakeng tsa makolone le dichaba tsa Maxhosa moeling wa Kapa Botjhabela.

blocks.text: Bo-rahistori ba bala hoo e ka bang **Dintwa tsa Moedi tse robong** ka lekgolo la dilemo. Karolong ena re sheba tse etsahetseng **mathwasong a bo-1800**. Ntwa e nngwe le e nngwe hangata e ne e fela ka Maxhosa a lahlehelwa ke naha e eketsehileng, ha kolone e ntse e sutuletsa moedi wa yona ho ya botjhabela.

items: Dintwa tsena di ne di bitswa hape Dintwa tsa Moedi wa Kapa kapa Dintwa tsa Maxhosa.
E ne e se ntwa e le nngwe e telele empa e le dikgohlano tse ngata tse arohaneng, ho e-na le khotso pakeng tsa tsona.
Ha nako e ntse e feta paterone e ne e le e hlakileng: naha e ne e fetela taolong ya kolone ho tswa taolong ya Maxhosa.

media.alt: Moedi wa kolone o supileng ka mola o marontho o hatelang pele ho ya ka hojane ha nako e ntse e feta.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='60' height='100' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cbb98f' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cfc094' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='70' y1='24' x2='70' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='110' y1='24' x2='110' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='150' y1='24' x2='150' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><path d='M74 20 L146 20 M138 14 L146 20 L138 26' fill='none' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fa baithuti setshwantsho se seholo pele ho dintlha. Baithuti ha ba hloke ho tshwara hloohong dintwa tsohle tse robong; ba hloka ho utlwisisa paterone - kgohlano e phetwang, ntwa e nngwe le e nngwe e fela ka moedi o sututseditswe botjhabela le Maxhosa a lahlehelwa ke naha. [SME] Bo-rahistori ba fapana ka hantle kamoo dintwa tse robong di baletsweng le ho behwa matsatsi; netefatsa palo le matsatsi ao o batlang baithuti ba a sebedise.

slides.title: Ho lelekwa Zuurveld
slides.lead: Mabotho a Borithane a ile a sutuletsa dikete tsa Maxhosa ho tshela Noka ya Fish ho lokolla naha bakeng sa kolone.

blocks.text: **Zuurveld** e ne e le sebaka sa naha ka bophirimela ho Noka ya Fish moo Maxhosa le makolone ba neng ba dula mmoho. Ka 1811-1812, 'Musisi **Sir John Cradock** o ile a laela masole a Borithane le balekane ba oona hore ba **leleke Maxhosa** mme ba a qobelle ho ya botjhabela ho tshela noka.

items: Kolone e ne e batla sebaka se hlwekileng, se se nang batho, se sireletsang moeleng wa yona wa botjhabela.
Ho lebela moedi o motjha, toropo ya Grahamstown e ile ya thehwa ka 1812.
Malapa a mangata a Maxhosa a ile a lahlehelwa ke matlo le naha ya phulo eo a neng a e sebedisa ka dilemo.

media.alt: Batho ba nang le dikgomo ba fallisetswa ho tshela noka ho ya botjhabela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 20 q-8 50 4 62 q10 20 -4 58' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='8'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8'/><rect x='144' y='70' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='178' cy='72' r='8'/><rect x='172' y='82' width='12' height='26'/></g><ellipse cx='196' cy='108' rx='16' ry='9' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M150 120 L200 120 M192 114 L200 120 L192 126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ona ke mohlala o hlakileng wa ho amohuwa naha. Hlalosa 'sebaka se sireletsang' (buffer zone) - kolone e ne e batla naha e se nang batho pakeng tsa yona le Maxhosa. Hlokomela ho thehwa ha Grahamstown (kajeno Makhanda) e le toropo ya sesole ya moedi. Sebetsana le sena ka hloko: malapa a sebele a ile a qobellwa ho tswa naheng ya oona. Botsa baithuti hore ba nahana Maxhosa a ile a ikutlwa jwang ka ho lelekwa.

slides.title: Bajaki ba Borithane ba 1820
slides.lead: Borithane bo ile ba romela bajaki ba ka bang 4,000 hore ba dule moeling e le thebe ya batho bakeng sa kolone.

blocks.text: Ka 1820 mmuso wa Borithane o ile wa thusa bajaki ba ka bang **4,000** ho fallela Kapa Botjhabela. Ba ile ba fuwa mapolasi sebakeng sa moedi, karolo e nngwe ho hodisa kolone mme karolo e nngwe ho **sireletsa moedi** kgahlano le Maxhosa.

items: Bajaki ba bangata ba ile ba sokola: naha e ne e le thata ho e lema mme kgohlano e ne e le haufi.
Ba bang ba ile ba tlohela temo mme ba qala ditoropo, mesebetsi ya matsoho le dikoranta.
Ho fihla ha bona ho ile ha eketsa kgatello holim'a naha ya Maxhosa haufi le moedi.

media.alt: Sekepe se seileng se le haufi le lebopo le koloi le ntlwana e nyenyane ya polasi lebopong.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='92' width='240' height='14' fill='#a8bcae'/><g><rect x='40' y='58' width='6' height='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M46 60 L84 60 L64 96 L46 96 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#8a6a44'/><path d='M30 96 L96 96 L86 108 L40 108 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><rect x='150' y='96' width='40' height='24' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M148 96 L170 78 L192 96 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='165' y='104' width='10' height='16' fill='#5c3a22'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa leano la Borithane: beha bajaki moeling ho o matlafatsa le ho o sireletsa. Hlokomela hore bajaki ba bangata ba bile le nako e thata mme ba fetohela mesebetsing ya toropong, se ileng sa hlahisa kgolo ya Grahamstown le dikoranta tsa moedi. Boloka tekanyo: bajaki hangata e ne e le malapa a tlwaelehileng a futsanehileng, empa ho fihla ha bona ho ne ho ntse ho eketsa kgatello holim'a naha ya Maxhosa.

slides.title: Makhanda le tlhaselo ya Grahamstown
slides.lead: Ka 1819 lebotho la Maxhosa le neng le etellwa pele ke moetapele wa ntwa le moporofeta Makhanda le ile la hlasela toropo ya moedi ya Grahamstown.

blocks.text: Maxhosa a ne a arohane pakeng tsa baetapele ba babedi, **Ngqika** le rangwane wa hae **Ndlambe**. Ha Borithane bo tshehetsa Ngqika, mabotho a Ndlambe a ile a hana. Ka 1819 mohale-moporofeta **Makhanda** (a bitswang hape Nxele kapa Makana) o ile a etella pele lebotho le leholo la Maxhosa tlhaselong e sebete ya **Grahamstown**.

items: Tlhaselo e ile ya hloleha, mme Maxhosa a lahlehelwa ke ba bangata.
Makhanda o ile a inehela mme a kwallwa Sehlekehlekeng sa Robben Island, moo a ileng a khangwa ke metsi ha a leka ho baleha.
Ka mor'a ntwa kolone e ile ya nka naha e eketsehileng, e etsa sebaka se 'sa nkang lehlakore' seo Maxhosa a neng a sa kgone ho kena ho sona.

media.alt: Motho a le mong e molelele a phahamisitseng lerumo a eme kapel'a toropo e nyenyane e nang le lerako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='84' width='70' height='36'/><rect x='160' y='72' width='16' height='12'/><rect x='192' y='72' width='16' height='12'/></g><circle cx='60' cy='52' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='54' y='66' width='12' height='40' fill='#2f5233'/><line x1='74' y1='30' x2='74' y2='108' stroke='#5c3a22' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M74 30 L70 44 L78 44 Z' fill='#7a7a7a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa karohano pakeng tsa Ngqika le Ndlambe le kamoo ho kena ha Borithane ho ileng ha tebatsa kgohlano. Hlahisa Makhanda e le moetapele ya bohlokwa le moporofeta, e seng feela mohlaseli. Ho kwallwa le lefu la hae Robben Island di mo etsa letshwao la pele la kganyetso. Hlokomela hape paterone: ka mor'a ntwa, kolone e ile ya nka naha e eketsehileng. [SME] Boholo ba lebotho la Makhanda hangata bo fanwa e le hoo e ka bang 10,000; netefatsa palo pele o e qotsa ho baithuti.

slides.title: Bathusi le karolo ya thopo
slides.lead: Baromuwa ba tlile ho ruta le ho sokolla - empa mosebetsi wa bona le oona o ile wa bulela taolo ya kolone tsela.

items: Ba hahile diteishene tsa boromuwa, dikolo le dikereke.
Ba ngodile puo ya Sexhosa mme ba ruta ho bala le ho ngola.
Ka nako tse ding ba sireletsa batho ba Afrika kgahlano le ho sotlwa.
Ba ile ba hatella batho hore ba tlohele ditumelo le meetlo ya bona.
Diteishene tsa boromuwa hangata di ne di fetoha metheo ya matla a kolone.
Ditlaleho le dimmapa tsa bona di ile tsa thusa kolone ho utlwisisa le ho laola naha.

slides.notes: Baromuwa ke mohlala o motle wa sehlooho sa 'tshebedisano le kgohlano' se rarahaneng. Dihlopha tse kang London Missionary Society (Dr Johannes van der Kemp, hamorao Dr John Philip) ka nako tse ding di ne di buella ditokelo tsa Makhoikhoi le Maxhosa, empa mosebetsi wa boromuwa le oona o ile wa fokotsa boipuso ba Maafrika mme wa nolofatsa katoloso ya kolone. Kgothaletsa baithuti ho tshwara maikutlo ana ka bobedi ho e-na le ho ahlola baromuwa e le ba batle feela kapa ba babe feela.

slides.title: Ho bolawa ha Morena Hintsa
slides.lead: Ka 1835 Borithane bo ile ba bolaya morena e moholo wa Maxhosa, Hintsa, nakong ya ntwa ya naha le dikgomo.

blocks.text: Ka 1834 ntwa e ile ya qhoma hape ha mabotho a Maxhosa, a halefile ka ho lahlehelwa ke naha, a kena ka kolone. Nakong ya ntwa Borithane bo ile ba tshwara **morena e moholo Hintsa ka Phalo**. Ka Motsheanong wa 1835 o ile a **thunngwa mme a bolawa ke masole a Borithane** a le motshwarwa, ketso e ileng ya tshosa le ho halefisa Maxhosa.

items: Ntwa e ile ya baka tahlehelo e kgolo ya bophelo le ya dikgomo mahlakoreng ka bobedi.
Lefu la Hintsa e ile ya ba letshwao le sa feleng la ho hloka toka ha kolone.
Kolone e ile ya boela ya sutuletsa moedi wa yona botjhabela ka mor'a ntwa.

media.alt: Lerumo le robehileng le behilwe holim'a thebe, letsatsi le le tlase ka morao, le tshwaya lefu la moetapele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 118 L240 118 L240 160 L0 160 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='120' cy='118' r='34' fill='#e0913a' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='10' ry='30' fill='#efe6d2'/><line x1='70' y1='70' x2='104' y2='104' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='138' y1='118' x2='172' y2='150' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ona ke motsotso o tebileng - o sebetse ka boineelo le ka dinnete. Hintsa e ne e le morena e moholo wa Maxhosa; ho bolawa ha hae a le motshwarwa ho ne ho bonwa e le ho eka mme ho sala e le histori e bohloko. Tsepamisa maikutlo hobaneng ho ne ho le bohlokwa: ho ile ha tebatsa kganyetso le ho se tshepane ha Maxhosa. Qoba dintlha tse tshabehang; ntlha e kgolo ke ho hloka toka le moriti wa yona o motelele. [SME] Maemo a hantle a lefu la Hintsa le ho sithabetswa ha hae a phehisanwa ke bo-rahistori; boloka tlaleho ya phaposi ya thuto e hlokolosi mme o netefatse mantswe.

slides.title: Moetapele ya loanetseng ho boloka naha
slides.lead: Morena Maqoma o ile a etella pele kganyetso ya Maxhosa ka mashome a dilemo mme a shwela a le motshwarwa Robben Island.

blocks.text: Naha e ne e le ya rona, mme re ke ke ra kgaotsa ho ikutlwa hore e ile ya nkuwa ho rona.
blocks.cite: Moya o hopotswang wa kganyetso ya Maxhosa moeling

blocks.text: **Maqoma**, mora wa Morena Ngqika, e ne e le e mong wa baetapele ba sesole ba Maxhosa ba nang le tsebo e kgolo dintweng tsa moedi. O ile a sututswa naheng ya hae sebakeng sa Kat River mme a qeta bophelo ba hae bo bongata a hanela katoloso ya kolone. Hamorao o ile a kwallwa **Robben Island**, moo a ileng a shwa teng ka 1873.

items: O ile a sebedisa maralla le mahlaka a moedi ka bohlale kgahlano le mabotho a maholo.
Bophelo ba hae bo bontsha tjhelete ya botho ya ho lahlehelwa ke naha, khafetsa.
Kajeno o hopolwa e le mohale wa kganyetso.

slides.notes: Maqoma o fa baithuti motho a le mong ya hopolehang ho tshwarella sehlooho sa kganyetso le ho amohuwa naha. Hlokomela hore lengolo lena ke poeletso e tshwarang maikutlo a Maxhosa a tahlehelo, e seng lengolo le netefaditsweng le tobileng - le hlahise ka mokgwa oo. Hokahanya ho kwallwa ha hae Robben Island le Makhanda pele, ho bontsha mola o motelele wa baetapele ba kganyetso ba neng ba tshwerwe teng. [SME] Netefatsa hore o phutholohile ho sebedisa lengolo le poeleditsweng, kapa le fetole ka le nang le mothopo.

slides.title: Moedi o fetohang, 1806-1836

blocks.alt: Tatelano ya nako ya diketsahalo tsa bohlokwa tsa moedi ho tloha 1806 ho isa 1836.

events.label: Borithane bo nka taolo e tsitsitseng ya Kolone ya Kapa
Maxhosa a lelekwa Zuurveld; Grahamstown ya thehwa
Makhanda o hlasela Grahamstown; naha e eketsehileng e nkuwa
Bajaki ba Borithane ba fihla moeling
Morena Hintsa o bolawa nakong ya Ntwa ya Botshelela ya Moedi
Leeto le Leholo (Great Trek) le qala ha Maburu a tswa koloneng

slides.notes: Sebedisa tatelano ena ya nako ho kopanya. Kopa baithuti ho latela paterone ho pharalla diketsahalo: kgohlano e nngwe le e nngwe e atisa ho fela ka moedi o sututseditswe botjhabela le Maxhosa a lahlehelwa ke naha. Hlokomela Leeto le Leholo (Great Trek) qetellong, leo baithuti ba ka le ithutang kamoso - le hlahile karolo e nngwe ka lebaka la ditsitsipano tsa moedi le diphetoho molaong wa kolone.

slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona
slides.lead: Moedi wa Kapa e ne e le sebaka sa tshebedisano le kgohlano - kgwebo le lenyalo, empa hape le ntwa le ho amohuwa naha.

blocks.text: Moeling wa Kapa Botjhabela, dichaba tsa Maxhosa, batrekboer, Makhoikhoi, bajaki ba Borithane le baromuwa ba ile ba **arolelana** naha ka kgwebo le bophelo ba letsatsi le letsatsi, empa hape ba ile ba **loana** ka naha, dikgomo le matla. Ntwa ka mor'a ntwa e ile ya fela ka Maxhosa a lahlehelwa ke naha, ha moedi wa kolone o ntse o tswela pele ho ya botjhabela.

blocks.question: Fana ka mehlala e mmedi ya tshebedisano pakeng tsa dihlopha tse fapaneng moeling wa Kapa.
Hlalosa mabaka a mabedi hobaneng kgohlano e ile ya hola moeling mathwasong a bo-1800.
Kgetha moetapele a le mong (Makhanda, Hintsa kapa Maqoma) mme o hlalose hobaneng a hopolwa.

slides.notes: Qetella ka ho boela dikarolong tse pedi tsa sehlooho - tshebedisano le kgohlano - hore baithuti ba di tshware ka bobedi kelellong. Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsweng kapa puisano; dikabelo tsa dintlha di latela mokgwa wa CAPS wa karabo e kgutshwane le ho ngola serapa. Hopotsa baithuti hore histori ena ya moedi e thusa ho hlalosa diketsahalo tsa hamorao tse kang Leeto le Leholo (Great Trek) le tahlehelo ya naha ya Maafrika ho pharalla Afrika Borwa.
